evals.name: speech-cut-cli
evals.prompt: Use the installed BlitzReels CLI to remove a spoken phrase and keep captions aligned.
evals.expected_output: Selects the CLI branch, uses timeline cut with preview, refreshes IDs, and verifies affected frames.

evals.name: caption-and-logo-rest
evals.prompt: Through REST, fix two caption words and move the logo into the safe area without changing other settings.
evals.expected_output: Selects REST, loads bounded state, patches only selected words and placement, then verifies frames.

evals.name: cli-missing-rest-fallback
evals.prompt: Edit this project, but the blitzreels command is not installed.
evals.expected_output: Uses the public REST contract when it supports the edit instead of stopping for CLI installation.
